info.name: Car Maintenance API
info.description: API for the Car Maintenance management system — includes admin dashboard, notifications, order search, and test items.

request.description: Returns the full admin dashboard data including revenue stats, latest service requests, technician info, and notifications.
Returns a list of admin notifications such as new orders, technician assignments, and completed orders.
Retrieves all test items from the database. Returns 500 if a database error occurs.
Searches orders by customer name or service name. Returns all orders if no query is provided.
